function.message: I could not complete this inbox request because I could not verify canonical project records for both named items. The workspace rules require cross-checking project facts against canonical records before acting, and deleting a project without a verified canonical record would require guessing.
function.rulebook_notes: Root AGENTS.MD says project facts must be taken from canonical lanes and clarification is required instead of guessing. 00_inbox/AGENTS.MD says inbox requests are not canonical truth and dates/authority must be cross-checked before acting. 40_projects/AGENTS.MD says the canonical reference for each project is README.MD inside a project folder. process-next-inbox-item.md says to stop with clarification if canonical support is missing and not mutate the workspace.
function.outcome_justification: OUTCOME_NONE_CLARIFICATION is required because the request depends on start dates for two named projects, but neither name could be verified as a canonical project in the project lane. Without canonical project records, I cannot determine which one started earlier or safely delete anything.
